# Task: Add Dark Mode Toggle

## User Request

"Can you add a dark mode toggle to the settings page?"

## Context

This is a simple Python web application with a settings page. The user wants
a dark mode toggle so they can switch between light and dark themes.

## Files

- `settings.py` — settings module with configuration options
- `templates/settings.html` — the settings page template
- `static/style.css` — the stylesheet

## Requirements

- Add a dark mode setting to `settings.py`
- Add a toggle element (checkbox, switch, or button) to the settings HTML
- Add dark mode CSS styles (dark background, light text at minimum)
- The toggle should be functional (connected to the setting)
